# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "AAD tenant ID."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    },
    "objectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of AAD objectIds (apps, service principals, groups, users) to grant secrets get/list."
      }
    },
    "secrets": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of secrets to create. Each item: { \"name\": \"secretName\", \"value\": \"secretValue\", \"contentType\": \"optional\", \"enabled\": true/false, \"notBefore\": \"optional ISO8601\", \"expires\": \"optional ISO8601\" }"
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enableRbacAuthorization": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "If true, access policies are not used; RBAC governs data-plane access. Leave false to use accessPolicies."
      }
    },
    "networkAclsDefaultAction": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Allow",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ]
    },
    "networkAclsBypass": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "AzureServices",
      "allowedValues": [
        "None",
        "AzureServices"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "accessPolicies": "[if(equals(parameters('enableRbacAuthorization'), true), json('[]'), array(map(parameters('objectIds'), createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', item(), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get','list'))))))]"
  },
  "functions": [
    {
      "namespace": "helpers",
      "members": {
        "map": {
          "parameters": [
            {
              "name": "arr",
              "type": "array"
            },
            {
              "name": "transform",
              "type": "any"
            }
          ],
          "output": {
            "type": "array",
            "value": "[array(createArray())]"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[toUpper(parameters('skuName'))]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[if(equals(parameters('enableRbacAuthorization'), true), json('[]'), array(map(parameters('objectIds'), createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', item(), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get','list'))))))]",
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "[parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction')]",
          "bypass": "[parameters('networkAclsBypass')]"
        },
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vaultName'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].name)]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secrets'))]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].value]",
        "contentType": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'contentType'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].contentType, json('null'))]",
        "attributes": {
          "enabled": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'enabled'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].enabled, true)]",
          "nbf": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'notBefore'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].notBefore, json('null'))]",
          "exp": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'expires'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].expires, json('null'))]"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('vaultName')),'2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
